criteria.name: Awards
criteria.rationale: RECOMB is a leading peer-reviewed computational biology conference; a Best Paper prize there is a recognized prize of excellence in the field.

criteria.name: Membership
criteria.evidence: Program committee member for NeurIPS; reviewer for Cell
criteria.rationale: NeurIPS program committee membership is invitation-only and conferred on experts of recognized standing; Cell reviewer status similarly requires demonstrated expertise.

criteria.name: Press
criteria.rationale: Quanta Magazine is a widely circulated, respected science publication whose coverage is editorially selective and directed at a broad audience beyond the field.

criteria.name: Judging
criteria.evidence: Reviewer for Cell (top-tier journal); program committee member for NeurIPS
criteria.rationale: Both roles involve formally evaluating the work of peers in the field, satisfying the judging criterion on two independent tracks.

criteria.name: Original contribution
criteria.evidence: US patent 11,902,114 for protein-folding optimization; FoldX2 framework (18,000 GitHub stars, adopted by 40+ labs)
criteria.rationale: The granted patent independently documents a novel method, and FoldX2's widespread adoption by 40+ research labs is concrete evidence of major significance to the field.

criteria.name: Scholarly articles
criteria.evidence: 31 peer-reviewed papers, 4,200 citations, h-index 34, including a 2023 Nature Methods paper
criteria.rationale: A publication record of this depth and citation impact in major journals clearly satisfies scholarly authorship in the field.

criteria.name: Critical role
criteria.evidence: Lead author and developer of FoldX2, used by 40+ labs; title of Staff Research Scientist
criteria.rationale: Her essential/leading role in FoldX2 is well-supported, but no description is given of a critical or leading role within her employing organization itself, leaving that part of the criterion thin.

criteria.name: High remuneration
criteria.rationale: $310K substantially exceeds typical compensation benchmarks for research scientists, supporting that she is remunerated at a level commensurate with extraordinary ability.

gaps: Critical role at employer: add documentation showing a leading, essential, or supervisory role within the employing institution (e.g., PI status on grants, lab leadership, team direction)
Awards: a single conference prize, while strong, could be supplemented with additional named awards, fellowships, or prizes to deepen this criterion
Press: only one outlet mentioned; additional coverage in major media or trade publications would reduce single-source risk on this criterion

FoldX2 impact: corroborate the 40+ labs figure with independent documentation (citations to the tool, institutional acknowledgments, or download statistics) to withstand RFE scrutiny on original-contribution magnitude
